body_txt: Think tutus , pretty girls , and Tchaikovsky . An index of ballets and works focused on ballet. To qualify, the work must either be a ballet or a ballet adaptation of an existing work, or have a primary focus on ballet and/or ballet dancers. For more information on the art itself, see the Useful Notes page . See also: Theatre , Opera note to which ballet is strongly linked , and Ballet Episode . Related tropes like Dainty Little Ballet Dancers , Killerina , Straight to the Pointe , and Tutu Fancy all have varying levels of Truth in Television . Creepy Ballet is when ballet is Played for Horror or Drama .
